title: The Rugby Panda Image Acquisition Input

searchPack.title: Search pack
searchPack.description: Named built-in search pack to run.

queries.title: Custom queries
queries.description: Used only when searchPack is custom. Keep the first run small to protect budget.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: External sources to query. Valid values are openverse and wikimedia. Google is intentionally not included.

resultsPerQueryPerSource.title: Results per query per source
resultsPerQueryPerSource.description: Small default keeps runs cheap and reviewable.

allowedLicenses.title: Allowed licences
allowedLicenses.description: Use cc0, pdm, by and by-sa unless the project policy changes.

minimumRugbyRelevanceScore.title: Minimum rugby relevance score
minimumRugbyRelevanceScore.description: Only records at or above this score become Candidate records. Lower scores are rejected for review/debugging.

dryRun.title: Dry run
dryRun.description: When true, output records are still candidates and no external CMS write is attempted.
